ddls:
CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the rental property */,
  "host_id" INTEGER /* ID of the host who owns the listing */,
  "neighbourhood_group" TEXT /* Group of neighbourhood where the property is located */,
  "neighbourhood" TEXT /* Specific neighbourhood of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the property */,
  "room_type" TEXT /* Type of room offered (e.g., Entire home/apt, Private room) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per night for the rental */,
  "minimum_nights" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for booking */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received for the property */,
  "last_review" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  "reviews_per_month" REAL /* Average number of reviews received per month */,
  "calculated_host_listings_count" INTEGER /* Number of listings managed by the host */,
  "availability_365" INTEGER /* Availability of the property over the year (days available) */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities available in the property */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Indicates if the listing is currently published and visible to guests */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp to track the last modification date of the listing */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Description of the cancellation policy for the listing */,
  "security_deposit" REAL /* Security deposit required for the listing */,
  "service_fee" REAL /* Service fee charged for the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_host_id FOREIGN KEY ("host_id") REFERENCES hosts ("host_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_neighbourhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood") REFERENCES neighbourhoods ("neighbourhood_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_neighbourhood_group FOREIGN KEY ("neighbourhood_group") REFERENCES neighbourhood_groups ("neighbourhood_group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "hosts" (
  "host_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each host */,
  "host_name" TEXT /* Name of the host */,
  "host_since" TEXT /* Date when the host started listing properties */,
  "number_of_listings" INTEGER /* Total number of listings managed by the host */,
  "host_email" TEXT /* Email address of the host for communication */,
  "host_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the host for emergency contact */,
  "host_address" TEXT /* Address of the host for mail and legal purposes */,
  "host_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the host based on guest reviews */,
  "host_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the host */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("host_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhood_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood group */,
  "neighbourhood_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighbourhood group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the neighbourhood group */,
  "group_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the neighbourhood group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighbourhoods" (
  "neighbourhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighbourhood */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the neighbourhood group it belongs to */,
  "neighbourhood_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the neighbourhood */,
  "neighbourhood_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the neighbourhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighbourhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being reviewed */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the reviewer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer for verification */,
  "reviewer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the reviewer for verification */,
  "reviewer_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the reviewer based on previous reviews */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is verified by the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being booked */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* ID of the guest making the booking */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Check-in date for the booking */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Check-out date for the booking */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the booking */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, canceled, pending) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., paid, unpaid) */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was canceled (if applicable) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "guest_email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "guest_since" TEXT /* Date when the guest registered */,
  "guest_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest for communication */,
  "guest_address" TEXT /* Address of the guest for mail and legal purposes */,
  "guest_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the guest based on host reviews */,
  "guest_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio or description of the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity (e.g., WiFi, Air Conditioning) */,
  "amenity_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the amenity */,
  "amenity_icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listing_amenities" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing that offers the amenity */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity provided in the listing */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the amenity is required by the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id", "amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing for which availability is specified */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for the availability status */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the listing is available on the specified date */,
  "minimum_stay" INTEGER /* Minimum number of nights required for the booking on the specified date */,
  "maximum_stay" INTEGER /* Maximum number of nights allowed for the booking on the specified date */,
  "price_override" REAL /* Custom price for the specified date (for dynamic pricing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id")
)
